title: Active Critical Alert: Guest OS experiencing CPU queue - Virtual Machine
cause: Following reasons can result in this issue - CPU demand inside guest OS is higher than available vCPU capacity, too many processes/threads waiting for CPU, application, batch job, antivirus, or backup agent consuming high CPU, VM has insufficient vCPUs for workload, VMware CPU contention causing high CPU Ready time.
resolution: This issue can be addressed with - identify and stop/tune high CPU processes inside OS, increase vCPU only if CPU is consistently saturated, right-size application thread/process count, move VM to less busy ESXi host if CPU Ready is high, review scheduled jobs, backup agents, antivirus scans.
